case_title: GRONA, EVELYN J. VS LINGAD, JACKIE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $716.00 FILED BY GRONA, EVELYN J. AS TO DEFENDANT LINGAD, JACKIE EURASIA TRAVEL & TOUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO JACKIE LINGAD -EURASIA TRAVEL AND TOUR RETURNED SIGNED;
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $700.00 FILED BY LINGAD, JACKIE EURASIA TRAVEL & TOUR AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GRONA, EVELYN J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRONA, EVELYN J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EURASIA TRAVEL & TOUR $617.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $643.00, JACKIE LINGAD IS DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT EURASIA TRAVEL & TOUR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GRONA, EVELYN J. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT EURASIA TRAVEL & TOUR
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26088, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRONA, EVELYN J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EURASIA TRAVEL & TOUR $617.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $643.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26088 ON 12-17-99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LINGAD, JACKIE EURASIA TRAVEL & TOUR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GRONA, EVELYN J. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
